def negative_default_timeout_missing_on_external_boundary_wrapper():
    rule_id = "default_timeout_missing_on_external_boundary_wrapper"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag wrappers around external boundaries that omit a timeout policy."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
